hero.subtitle: We build websites, mobile apps, and the systems that quietly run a business — for Cameroonian companies, NGOs and founders who've outgrown spreadsheets, paper and a Facebook page. Built to last, handed over in full, in French or English.

services.title: What We Build
services.subtitle: From concept to delivery, we create digital solutions that solve real business problems — not just software.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: Websites and web apps that load fast, are easy to update yourself, and are built to be found on Google — not just to look good in a screenshot.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.description: iOS and Android apps built for how people here actually use phones: fast, offline-friendly, and light on data.

digital.title: Business Digitalization
digital.description: The boring-but-vital part: turning your spreadsheets, paper ledgers and WhatsApp threads into one system that tells you what's really going on.

saas.title: SaaS & Custom Systems
saas.description: When off-the-shelf software doesn't fit, we build the platform or internal tool that does — owned by you, not rented from us.

whyUs.title: Why Choose {brand}
whyUs.subtitle: A few things we don't bend on — usually the exact places where agencies quietly let clients down.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: You always know the scope, the price, and where your project stands — no vague quotes, and no 'it's nearly done' that drags on for weeks.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: If we give you a date, we mean it. If something puts it at risk, you hear it from us early — not after it's already late.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: We build the simplest thing that actually solves the problem. A feature that can't earn its place doesn't ship.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: When it's done, it's yours — code, accounts, domain, all of it. We don't lock you in to keep you paying us.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: How a project really goes with us, start to finish — no mystery, and no disappearing for a month.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We dig into how your business actually works: lots of questions, a lot of listening. Most bad builds start by skipping this part.

design.title: Design
design.description: We map the whole thing out and show it to you before a line of code is written, so nothing surprises you halfway through.

development.title: Build
development.description: We build it the way we'd build our own product — clean, tested, and made to outlast launch day.

delivery.title: Handover
delivery.description: We launch it, show you how to run it, and hand over every account and key. Then we're still around when you need a change.

work.title: Recent projects
work.subtitle: A look at what we've designed and shipped — for clients and as our own products.

cta.title: Ready to Build Something Great?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your project. We'll help you define the right solution and bring it to life.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about {brand}'s mission, vision, core values, and approach to building digital solutions that structure and grow businesses.

header.title: About {brand}
header.subtitle: A technology-driven company that builds digital solutions and creates scalable products — with clarity, quality, and purpose.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Digitalising African business, one company at a time
mission.p1: We help businesses get their day-to-day operations onto real software — the unglamorous first step toward a continent that runs on its own data, its own tools, and its own decisions.
mission.p2: {brand} designs and builds websites, mobile applications, and internal business systems for clients. These services help organisations establish or improve their digital presence, digitalise internal processes, and gain efficiency, clarity, and operational control.
mission.placeholder: Digital foundations, built to be owned.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.title: From Digital Services to Venture Building
vision.p1: To grow from a digital services company into a venture-building organisation that both serves clients through high-quality solutions and creates scalable digital products.
vision.p2: {brand} follows a dual-growth approach: services generate revenue and market understanding, while products generate scalability and long-term value. Both pillars are essential and reinforce each other.

values.title: Core Values
values.subtitle: The non-negotiables. If a project asks us to drop one of these, we'd rather not take it.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: You always know the scope, the price, and where your project stands — no vague quotes, and no 'it's nearly done' that drags on for weeks.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: If we give you a date, we mean it — and if something threatens it, you hear from us early, not after it slips. Trust is the whole business.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: We build the simplest thing that solves the problem, and keep it understandable enough that you're never trapped with us just to change it.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: We own our mistakes and fix them on our time, not yours. And when a project ships, it's fully yours — code, accounts, the lot.

ethics.title: Ethical Work
ethics.description: Honest pricing with no surprise 'extras' later — and we'll tell you when you don't actually need what you're asking us to build.

story.title: Why I started {brand}
story.p1: I'm Abdel. I studied software engineering at the National Higher Polytechnic School of Douala, and I've been building websites, web apps and mobile apps ever since — first for myself, then for other people.
story.p2: I started Zekora because of a conviction I can't shake: Africa has to build its own digital future, not import it. Real development runs on digitalisation. When a business digitises how it works, it starts producing data that is clean, real, and its own — and enough of that data is what lets a country make better decisions, build local services, and one day train its own AI models instead of depending on tools designed in America, Europe or Asia.
story.p3: It all starts with the unglamorous first step: getting a business off paper and spreadsheets and onto something built properly. That's the part Zekora does — one system, one company at a time.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
believe: Client work pays the bills and keeps us close to real problems
Our own products are how we compound what we learn
A business running on real software is one that can actually grow
We grow only as fast as we can stay good

meta.title: Services
meta.description: {brand} offers web development, mobile applications, business digitalization, and SaaS & custom systems. Discover how we can help your business grow.

header.title: Our Services
header.subtitle: We build digital solutions that solve real problems. Each service is designed to help your business gain clarity, efficiency, and growth.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.problem: Plenty of businesses here run on a site a cousin built years ago, or no site at all — so when someone searches for them, they find nothing, or something that makes them look smaller than they really are.
webDev.solution: We design and build the site or web app properly: fast, easy for you to update yourself, structured so Google can actually find it, and ready to grow as you do.
webDev.benefit: A presence that works while you sleep — it earns trust, shows up in search, and stops quietly losing you the clients who looked you up and left.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.problem: On a phone, people give you about three seconds. A slow, clunky app — or no app when you clearly need one — quietly loses you users and money.
mobile.solution: We build iOS and Android apps around how people here actually use phones: quick, usable offline, and light on data, not bloated.
mobile.benefit: An app people actually keep on their phone — one that makes your service easier to use and opens a channel you control.

digital.title: Business Digitalization
digital.problem: Spreadsheets, paper and a dozen WhatsApp groups feel like they work — until you can't answer a simple question without calling three people, and small mistakes start costing real money.
digital.solution: We map how your operation actually runs, then build one system that automates the repetitive parts and connects the rest.
digital.benefit: Less double-entry, fewer errors, and a single place that tells you what's really going on — so you get your evenings back.

saas.title: SaaS & Custom Systems
saas.problem: Off-the-shelf tools rarely fit a business that does things its own way. You bend your process to the software, pay per seat forever, and still can't get the one feature you need.
saas.solution: We build the platform or internal tool to your exact process — multi-user, dashboards, the integrations you need — and hand it over as yours, not a subscription you rent from us.
saas.benefit: Software that fits like it was made for you, because it was — it grows on your terms, and you fully own and control it.

cta.title: Need a Custom Solution?
cta.subtitle: Every business is unique. Let's discuss your specific challenges and find the right approach together.

header.title: Our Work
header.subtitle: Every project is treated as a reference of the brand. Here are some of the digital solutions we've built.

portfolio.moreComingSoon: More projects coming soon. We document every build with care.

projects.title: Healthy Living Association (H.L.A)
projects.description: A modern, professional website for a nonprofit focused on preventive healthcare and community health education in Cameroon.
projects.aim: Build a modern, professional web presence for a nonprofit organization focused on preventive healthcare and community health education in Cameroon.

projects.title: TAMWIL — Personal Finance Manager
projects.description: A privacy-first, cross-platform personal finance app built with Flutter. 100% offline architecture with comprehensive financial tracking and analytics.
projects.aim: Provide a privacy-first personal finance management app that works 100% offline, ensuring user data never leaves their device.
features: Detailed expense categorization with custom categories

projects.title: Djangi — Cotisation Manager
projects.description: A mobile-first PWA for managing tontine/djangi group savings — a community-based savings tradition in Central & West Africa.
projects.aim: Digitize and simplify the management of informal community savings groups (djangi/tontines), replacing handwritten paper ledgers with a secure, offline-capable, mobile-friendly app.
features: End-to-end encrypted Google Drive backup & sync
PIN lock security for app access
